mapper.insert: insert into users( email, password, name, phone, gender, role, nick_name, photo_name, login_id ) values( #{email}, #{password}, #{name}, #{phone}, #{gender}, #{role}, #{nick_name}, #{photo_name}, #{login_id} )
mapper.select: select * from users where name=#{name} and email=#{email}
select * from users where email=#{email} and phone=#{phone}
